name: First Aid Kit (Pouch Type)
shortDescription: Small zip pouch first aid kit for a vehicle glovebox, bag or site visitor pack.
longDescription: A palm-sized zip pouch kit covering the basics — cotton, plasters and antiseptic — for a vehicle glovebox, staff bag or visitor safety pack where a full kit isn't practical.

images.alt: First Aid Kit (Pouch Type) supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Contents
specs.value: Cotton Balls x5, Bandaids x5, Antiseptic Lotion 50ml x1, Antiseptic Cream 15g x1, Gauze Swab 5x5cm x1
